reason: Preserve exact market identity, one-source daily evidence, sanitized provenance, no mock fallback, and AI handoff.
Preserve verified minute-provider and closed-session cache semantics while adding market-aware CN fallback.
Preserve provider settings, candidate normalization, persistence, social separation, secret masking, and no cookie scraping.
Keep only persisted news citable and preserve assistant evidence and safety boundaries.
Keep unsupported depth explicit and prohibit fabrication from daily/minute data.
Keep provider, no-data, degraded, and HTTP error semantics explicit and secret-safe.
Apply focused backend/API/provider tests and non-mutating diagnostics.
Exclude credentials, cookies, raw provider bodies, URLs with secrets, and stack traces.
Use existing client mutation, localized label, empty/error, and personal-research UI conventions.
Keep server data authoritative and use bounded local pending state plus direct projection replacement.
Cover route proxies, interactions, localization, accessibility, and full Vitest gates.
Keep additive backend payloads explicit at frontend boundaries.
Reuse daily coordinator, news persistence, and existing mutation components instead of duplicating logic.
Trace provider to service to API to frontend state and persisted AI evidence end to end.
